name: Oktoberfest
traditions: Beer tents serving Oktoberfest Märzen; traditional Bavarian dress (dirndl and lederhosen); brass band music; fairground rides; pretzel eating.
historicalBackground: Oktoberfest originated on October 12, 1810, as a celebration of Crown Prince Ludwig's marriage. The festival has grown into the world's largest Volksfest.
description: The world's largest beer festival in Munich, a 16-day celebration of Bavarian culture with traditional food, music, and millions of liters of beer.
